ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR STATUS RE: MINOR'S RETURN TO CALIFORNIA, CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2020 - A HEARING IS HELD. THE COURT AND COUNSEL CONFER REGARDING THE MINOR'S STAY IN GEORGIA AND HIS RETURN DATE OF AUGUST 2021 AS REFLECTED IN THE COURT'S CURRENT ORDER. THE COURT STATED THAT IT WILL STRIKE THE YEAR 2021 IN THE ORDER AND THAT IT DOESN'T THINK A RETURN DATE IS NEEDED. THE NEXT ANNUAL WRITTEN STATUS REPORT DATE IS SET FOR 9/28/21 AT 1:30 P.M., IN DEPT. 204. MS. BURKE IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER FOR THE COURT'S REVIEW AND SIGNATURE. -
